name: ai-agent-team
description: A 24/7 AI development team with specialized agent roles: Product Manager, Frontend Dev, Backend Dev, QA Engineer, DevOps Engineer, and Tech Lead. One-click install with bilingual (Chinese/English) command support.

findings_summary.notes: Repository confirmed (274 stars, MIT, JavaScript, created Nov 2025). Structured .claude/ directory with agents/ (product_manager.md, frontend_dev.md, backend_dev.md, devops_engineer.md, qa_engineer.md, tech-leader.md), commands/ (be-start.md, fe-start.md, ops-start.md, pm-start.md, qa-start.md, start-task.md), hooks/, skills/, and CLAUDE.md/USAGE.md. package.json with npm installable bin/ai-agent-team.js. Includes platform-specific install scripts (install.sh, install.bat, install.ps1). Multiple release note files present. MCP integration (.mcp.json). Concern: bilingual Chinese repo with limited community engagement (0 forks). No malicious code found.
